text_original: A rip off. Constant demands to spend money interrupt the chat, and then the chat locks forcing you to spend money to continue. There are so many AI apps that allow continued chatting. Don't get this one.
text_zh: 简直是坑人。不断要求花钱的要求总是打断聊天，然后聊天就会锁定，强迫你花钱才能继续。有这么多可以持续聊天的 AI 应用，千万别买这一个。
reply_original: Hi there! I am truly sorry for the frustrating experience. Maintaining high-quality AI involves significant server costs, which is why we have chat limits. However, we are working hard to offer more ways to earn free messages. Please share your specific feedback with us at support@fantachat.ai so we can improve. We hope you'll stay!
reply_zh: 你好！对于这次令人沮丧的体验，我深表歉意。维护高质量的人工智能需要巨大的服务器成本，这就是我们设置聊天限制的原因。不过，我们正在努力提供更多赚取免费消息的方式。请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享您的具体反馈，以便我们改进。我们希望您能留下！
